MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Chris Dewys (415-970-8012) appearing Plaintiff Catherine Wong and opposing party/ No apperances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Moving party failed to show how 20 of Complaint is irrelevant, false, improper or not drawn in conformity with the laws of this state in partition action. Order for the same signed in open Court. Judge Lilian Sing, Clerk: N. Bautista. Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DILLON WONG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court to be heard March 10, 2014 at 9:30 am. (See SF Local Rule 8.10.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. 302/EHG)
